title: Jumbo Comics
additional-note: All issues of this comic featured Sheena, Queen of the Jungle, who first appeared in the British comic Wags.  The first issue of this comic reprints an adventure that appeared in the January 1938 issue of Wags, several months prior to this comic's first issue.  The Sheena comics and other material reprinted or derived from foreign publications may still be copyrighted even without renewals or copyright notices, if they meet GATT copyright restoration requirements for works first published outside the US.
